summary: Backend refactoring verification complete. Orders API and Autoship System extracted from server.py to orders_routes.py and autoship_routes.py. Fixed critical bug in dependency injection pattern. 23/23 tests passed.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Broken dependency injection pattern - Depends(lambda: get_current_user) doesn't work with FastAPI
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Implemented get_current_user_from_token() function that properly extracts JWT from Authorization header

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Same broken dependency injection pattern as orders_routes.py
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Implemented get_current_user_from_token() function with proper JWT validation

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Duplicate routes conflicting with newly extracted orders_routes.py - /orders/my-orders, /orders, /orders/{order_id}
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Removed duplicate routes, kept only cart-related routes

endpoints_tested: GET /api/orders/my-orders - Get user's orders (requires JWT auth) ✓
GET /api/orders/{order_id} - Get specific order by ID or orderId ✓
GET /api/autoship/my-subscriptions - Get user's subscriptions (requires JWT auth) ✓

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: orders_routes.py and autoship_routes.py had broken dependency injection - Depends(lambda: get_current_user) doesn't work with FastAPI's dependency system
FIXED: Duplicate routes in order_routes.py were conflicting with newly extracted orders_routes.py
All extracted routes properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses using {'_id': 0} projection
Database injection pattern (set_database function) is consistent across all extracted files
Admin authentication is properly implemented using HTTPBasic with secrets.compare_digest
JWT authentication now works correctly with Authorization: Bearer header
updated_files: /app/backend/order_routes.py - Removed duplicate routes that conflicted with orders_routes.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring complete. Orders API and Autoship System extracted from server.py. Critical bugs in dependency injection were fixed. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_orders_autoship_routes.py for regression testing. All endpoints verified working with proper JWT and Basic Auth.
